cards.back: The process by which the world gets into our minds

cards.front: What is a good way to study perception?
cards.back: A good way to study it is by studying how it breaks
Vision sits at the top of the sensory hierarchy
That we only have sensory of activation that we have to work backwards from to construct reality

cards.front: What is perception as a constructive act and its two big components?
cards.back: That perception constructs reality, comps: sensory and top-down.

cards.front: Why do we need top down processing?

cards.back: The experience of lines that do not actually exist
The idea that perception cannot be influenced by conscious knowledge
